creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Do you plan to MFC (backport) this into /stable/13 (for 13.1) and /stable/12 (for 12.4) ? wlroots upstream (FreeBSD CI via builds.sr.ht) is curious how long they have to keep a workaround. Without any MFC it'd be until 2026-01-31 (or about 4 years) when /stable/13 reaches EOL.
